timeline.event: An haife shi a Hanseong Junsubang a matsayin ɗa na uku na Sarki Taejong da Sarauniya Wongyeong.
Lokacin da yayan shi Yarima Yangnyeong ya rasa matsayinsa, aka naɗa shi a matsayin sabon magajin gado.
Ya gaji karagar mulki daga Taejong kuma ya zama sarki na huɗu na Joseon a Gyeongbokgung Geunjeongjeon.
Ya naɗa Yi Jong-mu a matsayin kwamanda na sojojin ruwa, ya tura shi da jiragen ruwa 227 da sojoji 17,000 don mamaye Tsushima.
Ya kafa Cibiyar Jiphyeonjeon a cikin fadar don gudanar da tsarin tsakiya da bincike kan manufofin kasa.
An kebe shi daga bayar da kyautar 'yan mata, zinare da azurfa ga daular Ming.
Rundunar da Kim Jong-seo ke jagoranta ta kawar da mutanen Jurchen a yankin Hamgil-do, kuma suka kafa yankuna shida don fadada yankin arewa.
Ganin cewa talakawa suna fuskantar wahala wajen koyon haruffan Hanja na kasar Sin, ya kirkiri haruffa 28 da kansa.
Ya fitar da haruffan Hunminjeongeum da ya kirkira da kansa a hukumance.
Yanayin rashin lafiyarsa ya yi tsanani, kuma ya mutu bayan ya koma gidan Yarima Yeongeung.

keyAchievements.title: Kirkirar Hunminjeongeum
keyAchievements.description: Ya kirkiri Hunminjeongeum, wani ingantaccen tsarin haruffa na kimiyya wanda talakawa zasu iya koyo cikin sauki.

keyAchievements.title: Taimakawa wajen ci gaban Kimiyya da Fasaha
keyAchievements.description: Ya ba da cikakken goyon baya ga kirkire-kirkire kamar na Honcheonui, Angbuilgu, Jagyeokru da Cheugugi, kuma ya dauki nauyin malamai kamar Jang Yeong-sil da Choi Hae-san.

keyAchievements.title: Karfafa tsaro
keyAchievements.description: Ya tura Yi Jong-mu don mamaye Tsushima, sannan ya tura Choi Yun-deok da Kim Jong-seo zuwa arewa domin kafa shiyyoyi 4 da 6, inda ya fadada iyakokin kasar.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa tsarin siyasa
keyAchievements.description: Ya dauki mutane irin su Hwang Hui, Maeng Sa-seong, Yun Hoe, da Kim Jong-seo don kula da harkokin gwamnati, wanda ya zama asalin tsarin Uijeongbuseosaje.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa tsarin haraji
keyAchievements.description: Ya tabbatar da tsarin harajin kasa na Joseon ta hanyar kafa dokoki kamar Jeonbun 6-deungbeop da Yeonbun 9-deungbeop.

keyAchievements.title: Tattara litattafai
keyAchievements.description: Ya tattara litattafai daban-daban da suka hada da Worin Cheongangjigok, Yongbieocheonga, Nongsajikseol, da Goryeosa.

faq.question: Yaushe aka haifi Sarki Sejong Babba?
faq.answer: An haifi Sejong a ranar 15 ga Mayu, 1397 a Hanseong Junsubang a matsayin ɗa na uku ga Sarki Taejong da Sarauniya Wongyeong.

faq.question: Ta yaya Sarki Sejong ya hau karagar mulki?
faq.answer: Lokacin da babban wansa Yarima Yangnyeong ya rasa matsayinsa, an naɗa shi matsayin magajin gado, kuma a shekarar 1418 ya hau mulki bayan mahaifinsa Taejong ya janye.

faq.question: Menene babbar nasarar da Sarki Sejong ya samu?
faq.answer: Kirkirar Hunminjeongeum, wani ingantaccen tsarin haruffa na kimiyya wanda talakawa za su iya koya a saukake, yana daya daga cikin manyan nasarorin da ya samu.

faq.question: Wace irin rawa Sarki Sejong ya taka a fannin tsaro?
faq.answer: Ya aike da Yi Jong-mu don kwace Tsushima, sannan ya aike da Choi Yun-deok da Kim Jong-seo zuwa arewa inda suka fadada iyakokin kasar ta hanyar kafa shiyyoyi 4 da 6.

faq.question: Yaushe Sarki Sejong ya mutu?
faq.answer: Sarki Sejong ya mutu a ranar 30 ga Maris, 1450.

timeline.event: An haife shi a matsayin ɗan Philip II da Olympias a Pella, babban birnin Makidoniya.
Ya doke rundunonin Athens da Thebes a Yakin Chaeronea tare da Philip II.
Ya gudu daga Makidoniya tare da mahaifiyarsa kafin ya koma bayan wata 6.
Bayan kisan mahaifinsa Philip II, ya gaji karagar mulkin Makidoniya yana da shekaru 20.
Don tabbatar da iyakar arewa, ya yaki 'yan tawaye a Thrace, Triballi, da Illyria sannan ya murkushe tawayen Thebes kuma ya lalata birnin.
Ya tsallake Hellespont don fara mamaye Daular Achaemenid (Daular Farisa ta Farko) kuma ya sami nasara a Yakin Granicus.
Ya kai hari sannan ya ci Tyre, ya shiga Masar inda aka dauke shi a matsayin mai ceto.
Ya bar Masar zuwa Mesofotamiya, ya ci Darius III a Yakin Gaugamela kuma ya kama Babila.
Ya kai hari Indiya amma sojojinsa suka ki ci gaba, inda suka koma baya daga Kogin Hyphasis.
Ya mutu a Babila yana da shekaru 33.

keyAchievements.title: Ginin Babbar Daula
keyAchievements.description: Ya gina wata daula da ba a taba ganin irinta ba a yammacin Turai, tun daga Girka har zuwa Masar da arewa maso yammacin Indiya.

keyAchievements.title: Nasara a fagen Soja
keyAchievements.description: Ba a taba cin sa da yaki ba, wanda yasa ake ganinsa a matsayin daya daga cikin mafi nasarar shugabannin soja a tarihi.

keyAchievements.title: Rushewar Daular Farisa
keyAchievements.description: Ya murkushe sojojin Farisa a yakokin Issus da Gaugamela, wanda ya kai ga mutuwar Darius III kuma ya kawo karshen Daular Farisa ta Farko.

keyAchievements.title: Taimako wajen Al'adun Hellenism
keyAchievements.description: Ya gina birane masu suna 'Alexandria' a yankunan da ya ci, wanda ya bunkasa haduwar al'adun gabas da yamma da kirkirar al'adun Hellenistic.

keyAchievements.title: Siyasar Hadin Kan Gabas da Yamma
keyAchievements.description: Ya karbi al'adun Farisa, ya karfafa auren tsakanin Girkawa da mutanen yankunan da aka ci, kuma ya dauki ma'aikatan Farisa don hade gabas da yamma.

faq.question: Waye malamin Iskandar Makidoniye (Alexander the Great)?
faq.answer: Ya yi karatu a karkashin masanin falsafa Aristotle har zuwa shekaru 16, tare da Anaximenes na Lampsacus wanda shima ya koya masa.

faq.question: Wace irin daula Iskandar Makidoniye ya gina?
faq.answer: Ya gina daula da ta fara daga Girka har zuwa Masar a kudu da arewa maso yammacin Indiya a gabas, wacce bata da tamka a tarihi.

faq.question: Shin Iskandar Makidoniye ya taba faduwa a yaki?
faq.answer: Ba a taba cin sa da yaki ba, kuma ana daukarsa daya daga cikin jagororin soja mafi nasara a tarihi.

faq.question: Ta yaya Iskandar Makidoniye ya rusa Daular Farisa?
faq.answer: A yakokin Issus da Gaugamela, ya murkushe sojojin Farisa kuma ya kai ga mutuwar Darius III, inda ya rusa Daular Farisa ta farko.

faq.question: Wadanne birane Iskandar Makidoniye ya kafa?
faq.answer: Ya gina birane da dama da aka sa wa suna 'Alexandria', inda Alexandria ta Masar ita ce wacce ta fi shahara.

alexander-the-great.missingDataNote: An tabbatar da duk bayanan ne daga asalin majiyoyin da aka bayar.

timeline.event: Yuli 30, an haife shi a wani gari a yammacin Detroit, Michigan, Amurka.
Mahaifiyarsa ta mutu lokacin yana da shekaru 12.
Ya bar makaranta yana da shekaru 15 don zama makaniki.
Aka gayyace shi ya yi aiki a matsayin injiniya a kamfanin wutar lantarki na Edison.
Ya kirkiri motarsa ta farko wacce ke amfani da injin konewa na ciki (internal combustion engine).
Bayan ya bar kamfanin Edison, ya kafa Kamfanin Ford Motors yana da shekaru 40, inda ya fara kera Ford Model T ta hanyar tsarin taron sarrafawa (assembly line).
Ya wallafa littafinsa 'Yau da Gobe' (Today and Tomorrow).
Ya wallafa littafinsa 'Falsafar Masana'antata' (My Philosophy of Industry).
Afrilu 7, ya mutu yana da shekaru 84 a duniya.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Kamfanin Ford Motor
keyAchievements.description: A shekarar 1903, yana da shekaru 40, ya kafa Kamfanin kerar motoci na Ford.

keyAchievements.title: Kera Motar Farko
keyAchievements.description: A 1892, ya kirkiri injin konewa na ciki wanda ya yi amfani dashi wajen kera mota.

keyAchievements.title: Gabatar da Tsarin Model T da Kera Da Yawa
keyAchievements.description: A 1903, ya kawo tsarin taron sarrafawa (belt conveyor system) a karon farko a duniya don fara kera motocin Ford Model T da yawa.

keyAchievements.title: Tsarin Fordism
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa falsafar gudanarwa guda hudu da suka hada da barin tsoron gaba, rashin yin aiki don gasa, sanya taimako gaban riba, da kerawa a farashi mai sauki don sayarwa a farashi mai sauki.

keyAchievements.title: Bunkasa Tsarin Ford
keyAchievements.description: Ya gabatar da gangamin 3S wanda ya shafi daidaita kayayyaki, saukake bangarori, da kwarewar aiki ta amfani da na'urar jigilar kaya wanda ya inganta aikin masu aiki.

keyAchievements.title: Inganta Rayuwar Ma'aikata
keyAchievements.description: Bayan kafa kamfaninsa, ya fito da sharudda na musamman ga ma'aikata kamar 'awanni 8 a rana da mafi karancin albashi na dala 5'.

faq.question: Yaushe aka haifi Henry Ford kuma yaushe ya mutu?
faq.answer: An haifi Henry Ford a ranar 30 ga Yuli, 1863, kuma ya mutu a ranar 7 ga Afrilu, 1947 yana da shekaru 84.

faq.question: Wane kamfani Henry Ford ya kafa?
faq.answer: Ya kafa Kamfanin Ford Motor (Ford Motor Company) wajen kera motoci a shekarar 1903.

faq.question: Wadanne ne manyan nasarorin Henry Ford?
faq.answer: Ya kera mota a shekarar 1892 kuma a shekarar 1903 ya kirkiro tsarin taron sarrafawa wanda ya haifar da kerar motocin Ford Model T da yawa.

faq.question: Wace alaka ce tsakanin Henry Ford da Thomas Edison?
faq.answer: Henry Ford ya yi aiki a matsayin babban injiniya a kamfanin da Edison ya kafa, inda aka gayyace shi yin aiki a kamfanin hasken wutar lantarki na Edison a 1890.

timeline.event: An haife shi a matsayin ɗan fari a gidan masu hannu da shuni na dawaki a Arpinum, Italiya.
Ya yi aikin soja.
Yakin basasa tsakanin Gaius Marius da Sulla ya barke, a lokacin ya karanci falsafar Plato da Aristotle a karkashin Philo.
Ya fara aiki a matsayin lauya a karon farko.
Ya sami daukaka bayan ya kare Roscius da aka zarga da kashe mahaifinsa.
Ya bar Roma zuwa Athens da Rhodes don karatun kissa (rhetoric) da falsafa karkashin Posidonius.
Ya shiga ofishin gwamnati a matsayin ma'aji (quaestor).
An zabe shi a matsayin Aedile; ya dauki shari'ar Verres, inda ya tabbatar da laifin Verres kuma ya zama babban lauyan Roma inda ya rubuta jawabai kan Verres.
An zabe shi Praetor, ya rubuta jawabin goyon bayan Pompey sannan ya wallafa kariyarsa ga Murena.
Ya zama Consul wanda shine babban matsayin gudanarwa, ya hana juyin mulkin Catiline, kuma ya gabatar da jawabai kan Catiline.
Ya wallafa kariya ga Archias.
Tsarin mulki na mutum uku tsakanin Caesar, Pompey, da Crassus ya fara, wanda ya jefa shi cikin matsalar siyasa.
Dokar Tribune Clodius Pulcher ta tilasta shi barin Roma zuwa gudun hijira a Makidoniya, inda aka lalata gidajensa.
Ya koma Roma da taimakon magoya bayansa inda aka biya shi diyya kan asarar da ya yi.
Ya wallafa 'Game da Mai Magana' (De Oratore).
Ya wallafa 'Yadda Ake Tsara Jawabi' (De Partitione Oratoria).
An zabe shi a matsayin Augur don komawa ofishin jama'a.
Ya wallafa 'Game da Dokoki' (De Legibus).
An zabe shi gwamnan Cilicia kuma ya wallafa 'Game da Jamhuriya' (De Re Publica).
Yakin basasa tsakanin Caesar da Pompey ya barke kuma ya shiga bangaren Pompey bayan an zabe shi Gwamnan Capua.
Caesar ya ci Pompey a Pharsalus, kuma Cicero ya koma Italiya da amincewar Caesar.
Ya wallafa litattafai kamar 'Stoic Paradoxes', 'Brutus', da 'The Orator'.
Yarsa mai daraja Tullia ta mutu, sannan ya wallafa 'Consolation', 'Hortensius', da 'Game da Yanayin Alloli'.
An kashe Caesar, kuma Cicero ya dawo fagen siyasa.
Ya gabatar da jawabai na Philippic don sukar Mark Antony.
Ya wallafa litattafai da yawa da suka hada da 'Divination', 'Akan Tsufa', da 'Akan Ayyuka'.
Octavian, Antony, da Lepidus sun fara Tsarin Mulkin Mutum Uku na Biyu.
An kashe shi da sojojin Antony a Formia.

keyAchievements.title: Tabbatar da Harshen Latin na gargajiya
keyAchievements.description: Cicero ne ya tsara tsarin harshen Latin na gargajiya, kuma ana ganin salonta a matsayin mizani na harshen.

keyAchievements.title: Samun Matsayin Babban Lauyan Roma
keyAchievements.description: A shari'ar Verres ta 70 K.Z., ya ci lauyan da yafi shahara a lokacin, inda ya zama babban lauyan Roma.

keyAchievements.title: Hana juyin mulkin Catiline a matsayin Consul
keyAchievements.description: A lokacin da yake Consul a 63 K.Z., ya hana juyin mulkin Catiline tare da ceto jamhuriyar Roma.

keyAchievements.title: Shigo da falsafar Girka cikin Latin
keyAchievements.description: A lokacin da ya daina siyasa, ya dukufa wajen fassara ka'idojin falsafar Girka zuwa harshen Latin.

faq.question: Yaushe kuma a ina aka haifi Cicero kuma yaushe ya mutu?
faq.answer: An haifi Cicero a ranar 3 ga Janairu, 106 K.Z. a Arpinum, Italiya, kuma an kashe shi a Formia a ranar 7 ga Disamba, 43 K.Z.

faq.question: Yaya kimar siyasar Cicero take?
faq.answer: Akimar siyasarsa gaba daya ba a girmama ta, inda ake daukarsa a matsayin mai hangen nesa da ya rude cikin siyasa da wani mai amfani da damar dake gabansa.

faq.question: Wane tasiri Cicero ya yi akan harshen Latin na gargajiya?
faq.answer: Cicero ne ya kafa tubalin harshen Latin na gargajiya, wanda yasa salonsa ya zama ma'auni wajen koyon harshen Latin har wa yau.

faq.question: Ta yaya Cicero ya mutu?
faq.answer: A ranar 7 ga Disamba, 43 K.Z., ya zama abin da Antony zai kashe saboda mulkin mutum uku, sannan aka yanke kansa da hannayensa aka nuna su a dandalin Roma.

timeline.event: An haifi Helen Adams Keller a gonar Ivy Green da ke Tuscumbia, Alabama, Amurka.
Mahaifiyarta Kate Keller ta karanta littafin Charles Dickens 'American Notes' kuma ta ziyarci J. Julian Chisolm a Baltimore don neman shawara.
Anne Sullivan ta isa gidan Helen don fara koya mata karatu.
Helen ta shiga makarantar Perkins ga makafi.
Ta rubuta 'The Frost King' tana da shekaru 11.
Helen Keller da Anne Sullivan sun koma New York don zuwa makarantun kutare da kurame na Wright-Humason da Horace Mann.
Ta koma Massachusetts kuma ta halarci Makarantar 'Yan Mata ta Cambridge.
An shigar da ita kwalejin Radcliffe, makarantar 'yan mata a karkashin Jami'ar Harvard.
Ta wallafa tarihin rayuwarta 'The Story of My Life' tare da Anne Sullivan da mijinta John Macy.
Ta kammala karatunta daga Radcliffe College tana da shekaru 24, wanda ya sa ta zama mutum na farko kurma da kuma makaho da ya sami digirin farko.
Ta wallafa 'The World I Live In'.
Ta shiga Jam'iyyar gurguzu ta Amurka tana da shekaru 29.
Ta shiga kungiyar Industrial Workers of the World (IWW).
An buga jeren rubutun 'Out of the Dark' wanda yayi bayani akan gurguzu.
Ta kafa kungiyar 'Helen Keller International' tare da George Kessler.
Ta yi rubutu don IWW.
Ta fito a wani fim maras sauti mai suna 'Deliverance'.
Ta taimaka wajen kafa American Civil Liberties Union (ACLU).
An buga littafin 'My Religion'.
Anne Sullivan ta mutu.
Ta ziyarci yankin Akita na Japan sannan aka bata karen Akita mai suna 'Kamikaze-go' bayan ta tambaya akan karen Hachiko.
Bayan mutuwar 'Kamikaze-go', gwamnatin Japan ta bata dan uwansa 'Kenzan-go' a matsayin kyauta.
An aiwatar da aikin rubutun William Gibson 'The Miracle Worker'.
Polly Thomson ta mutu sakamakon bugun jini (stroke).
Ta yi fama da bugun jini, wanda yasa ta shafe karshen rayuwarta a gida.
Fim din 'The Miracle Worker' da Anne Bancroft da Patty Duke suka fito ya lashe kyautar Oscar.
Ta sami lambar yabo ta Shugaban Kasa daga Shugaba Lyndon B. Johnson.
An shigar da ita cikin dakin shahararrun mata na Amurka a Baje Kolin Duniya na New York.
Ta mutu tana da shekaru 88 a gidanta a Arcan Ridge, Easton, Connecticut.
Ta zama daya daga cikin mutane 18 mafi daraja a karni na 20 a jerin Gallup.
Jihar Alabama ta sanya hoton Helen Keller akan tsabar kudi na kwata (quarter).
An kara wani mutum-mutumin gangar jiki na Helen Keller zuwa dakin nuna zane-zane na Amurka.

keyAchievements.title: Samun digiri na farko a matsayin kurma kuma makaho
keyAchievements.description: A 1904, ta zama mace kurma kuma makauniya ta farko da ta kammala karatun digirin farko na Arts a kwalejin Radcliffe.

keyAchievements.title: Mawallafiya da malama
keyAchievements.description: Ta wallafa litattafai 12 tare da kasidu daban-daban kuma ta zama marubuciya kuma malama a Amurka.

keyAchievements.title: Yin fafutuka a Gurguzu da Hakkin Dan Adam
keyAchievements.description: Ta shiga kungiyoyi daban-daban na hakkin masu kada kuri'a, tabbatar da zaman lafiya, adawa da hukumcin kisa da wariyar launin fata.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Helen Keller International
keyAchievements.description: A 1915, ta kafa 'Helen Keller International' don bincike akan lafiyar gani, abinci, da walwala.

keyAchievements.title: Taimakawa wajen kafa ACLU
keyAchievements.description: Ta bada gudunmawa wajen kafa American Civil Liberties Union (ACLU) a 1920.

keyAchievements.title: Kyaututtuka na Kasa
keyAchievements.description: Ta sami lambar yabon Shugaban Kasa a 1964, an shigar da ita cikin dakunan shahararrun mata a 1965, kuma an karrama ta bayan mutuwarta.

faq.question: Yaushe aka haifi Helen Keller kuma yaushe ta mutu?
faq.answer: An haife ta a ranar 27 ga Yuni, 1880 kuma ta mutu a ranar 1 ga Yuni, 1968 tana da shekaru 88.

faq.question: Ta yaya Helen Keller ta rasa jininta da ganinta?
faq.answer: A watanni 19 da haihuwa, an gano tana da cutar zazzabin scarlet da sankarau (meningitis), wanda ya jawo mata makanta da kurmantaka na dindindin.

faq.question: Wanene ya fi tasiri wajen ilimantar da Helen Keller?
faq.answer: Anne Sullivan wacce ta zo gidan Helen a Maris 1887 kuma ta koya mata harshe ta hanyar rubuta kalmomi akan hannunta.

faq.question: Wadanne kungiyoyin kare hakki Helen Keller ta shiga?
faq.answer: Ta kasance mai ra'ayin gurguzu wacce ta tsaya akan hakkin mata, wariyar launin fata, hakkin kananan yara, da sauransu.

faq.question: Wane shahararren fim akayi akan Helen Keller?
faq.answer: Fim din 'The Miracle Worker' yayi bayanin rayuwarta da alakarta da Anne Sullivan kuma fim din ya ci kyautar Oscar a 1962.

helen-keller.missingDataNote: Ba a fadi ainihin shekarar da ta rasa ganinta da jininta a asalin majiyar ba bayan cutar data kamata tana da watanni 19.
